data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be executed.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteDirectory
data.value: Do you want to delete this directory?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteFile
data.value: Do you want to delete this file?

data.name: ConfirmExcludeItem
data.value: Do you want to exclude this item from the project?

data.name: FailedToOpenFileWithExtension
data.value: Could not open the following file with '{0}'. '{1}'

data.name: EditorContextAlreadyCreated
data.value: The editor context has already been created.

data.name: EditorContextNull
data.value: Null was specified for the editor context.

data.name: ValueLessThanOrEqualToZero
data.value: Cannot specify a value less than or equal to 0.

data.name: ValueLessThanZero
data.value: Cannot specify a value less than to 0.

data.name: RenameConflict
data.value: Cannot rename from "{0}" to "{1}" because the new name conflicts with an existing folder.

data.name: ConfirmLoadSideloadExtensions
data.value: Do you want to load sideload extensions?

data.name: AudioPlaybackException
data.value: An exception occurred during audio playback.

data.name: FrameDrawingException
data.value: An exception occurred while drawing the frame.

data.name: PreviousSessionErrorTitle
data.value: Looks like it ended with an error last time.

data.name: CrashRecoveryDescription
data.value: Beutl was closed unexpectedly last time. Choose how to start this session.

data.name: CrashRecoveryRestrictedModeOption
data.value: Run in restricted mode (extensions are not loaded).

data.name: PackageChangesInProgress
data.value: Changes to the package are in progress.

data.name: RestoreFailedTypeNotFound
data.value: Could not restore because the type could not be found.

data.name: RestoreFailedDeserializationError
data.value: Could not restore because an exception occurred during deserialization.

data.name: VersionDiscontinued
data.value: This version has been discontinued for compatibility reasons. Please upgrade to a newer version.

data.name: FileSaveException
data.value: An exception occurred while saving the file.

data.name: SvgPathParsingException
data.value: An exception occurred while parsing the SVG path.

data.name: SigninInvalid
data.value: Sign-in has become invalid. Please sign in again.

data.name: CheckDifferentVersion_Title
data.value: Opening a file that was opened in a previous version may result in file corruption.

data.name: CheckDifferentVersion_Content
data.value: You are running on a different version than last time.

data.name: ProjectVersionMismatch_Content
data.value: The project was created with a newer version of Beutl (>= {0}). Please update Beutl to open the project.

data.name: ApplicationRestartRequired
data.value: The application needs to be restarted. Do you want to restart the application?

data.name: ScriptErrorTerminated
data.value: An error has occurred. Terminate script.

data.name: UpdateDirectoryNotFound
data.value: Error: Update directory does not exist.

data.name: PressEnterWhenFinished
data.value: Press the Enter key when finished.

data.name: UpdateCompletedLaunchPrompt
data.value: Update completed. Do you want to start the application? (y/n):

data.name: FailedToChangePermissions
data.value: Failed to change application execution permissions.

data.name: ApplicationPathNotSpecified
data.value: The application execution path is not specified.

data.name: UpdateCompletedLaunchConfirm
data.value: Update completed. Do you want to start the ߋn application?

data.name: ConfirmInstall
data.value: Do you want to install? (The update function is an experimental feature.)

data.name: ColorGradingMissing
data.value: No Color Grading effect is selected.

data.name: ColorCurvesMissing
data.value: No Color Curves effect is selected.

data.name: InvalidKeyframeDataFormat_TypeIsNotKeyFrame
data.value: Invalid keyframe data format. $type is not KeyFrame.

data.name: KeyframePropertyTypeMismatch_EasingApplied
data.value: The property type of the pasted keyframe does not match. Only the easing is applied.

data.name: InvalidJSON_TypeIsNotKeyFrameAnimation
data.value: Invalid JSON: $type is not a KeyFrameAnimation

data.name: InvalidJSON_TypeIsNotKeyFrame
data.value: Invalid JSON: $type is not a KeyFrame

data.name: AnimationPropertyTypeMismatch
data.value: The property type of the pasted animation does not match. (Expected: {0}, Actual: {1})

data.name: KeyframeExistsAtPastePosition
data.value: A keyframe already exists at the paste position. The easing and value have been updated.

data.name: CannotPasteFromClipboard
data.value: Cannot paste: clipboard does not contain a compatible object.
